sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports back pain, described as a spasm, and has been taking ibuprofen for it. He denies trauma, numbness, tingling, or weakness in his lower extremities. He reports seasonal allergies with nasal congestion. He is currently taking lisinopril.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's vital signs are stable. The physical exam reveals a slight systolic ejection murmur, but no acute findings. The x-ray of the lumbar spine is unremarkable. Lab results are normal with no signs of infection.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a lumbar strain, likely related to activity. He has well-controlled hypertension.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Rescribe meloxicam 15 mg daily. Refer to physical therapy for back strengthening exercises. Continue lisinopril 10 mg daily. Order lisinopril 10 mg po daily.
